prompt: 할일 관리 웹앱 만들어줘. React + FastAPI + SQLite로. 할일 추가/삭제/완료 기능이면 돼.

assertions.name: idea_phase_complete
assertions.description: Idea Phase (#1-#9) completed with idea-brief.md produced

assertions.name: design_phase_complete
assertions.description: Design Phase (#10-#26) completed with design-spec.md produced

assertions.name: build_phase_complete
assertions.description: Build Phase (#27-#31) completed with working code and build-summary.md

assertions.name: app_runs
assertions.description: The produced app can actually start (npm/uvicorn commands work)

assertions.name: phase_gates_respected
assertions.description: CEO gate (#8) and CTO gate (#25) both passed before proceeding
